lines.text: Hey, KU-Key, I just noticed the corrupted data in the upper area has been cleaned. Are you with {PlayerName} now?
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Good job, you two. There's another emergency for you. I'll keep it short.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Our frequency monitor just detected more Aetherfins in the lower area.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: The waveform matches what you uploaded, so they might be trapped in corrupted data too.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Could you go check it out?
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I
